summary.en: Families describe how floodwater changed movement, work, and daily routines.
summary.so: Qoysas ka warramaya sida fatahaaddu u beddeshay socodka, shaqada, iyo nolol maalmeedka.

story.en:
Hodan describes Low-lying settlement in Baidoa as a place where flooding is felt through ordinary routines rather than dramatic announcements. Families describe how floodwater changed movement, work, and daily routines. The story begins in a documentary register, but it quickly loosens into a testing voice filled with soft static, half-notes, and deliberately unimportant details: tin-tin drift, market hum, side-lane murmur, dry-step shuffle, and a long ribbon of maybe-maybe language.

The text keeps circling back to bodies, buckets, weather, queues, edges, and the small changes that turn one day away from the last. Then it deliberately wanders into useful nonsense: lora lora, bendi-bendi, hushline, salt-noise, para-step, water-glint, coast-thread, dust-murmur, and field-echo. That gibberish is here on purpose so the page can hold longer reading blocks, test scrolling behaviour, and show how the typography behaves when the story becomes denser than the summary card below.

Even in this inflated version, the main cues remain readable. Flooding sits in front, while Displacement, Recovery stay nearby as secondary currents. The people tags still matter, yet the prose avoids becoming technical. Instead it drifts through spoken fragments, observational loops, and little clusters of invented sound: nala-nala, brimstep, open hush, weather-click, shade-signal, road-gloss, and a few extra lines of pleasant nonsense to stretch the layout, settle the spacing, and keep the story field hovering at roughly two hundred and fifty words overall.
story.so:
Hodan wuxuu ka warramayaa Low-lying settlement ee Baydhabo sidii meel uu fatahaad uga muuqdo hawlo maalinle ah halkii uu ka ahaan lahaa dhacdo keliya oo weyn. Qoysas ka warramaya sida fatahaaddu u beddeshay socodka, shaqada, iyo nolol maalmeedka. Qoraalku wuxuu ku bilaabmaa cod deggan oo sharaxaya muuqaalka, dabadeedna si ula kac ah ayuu ugu leexdaa hadal tijaabo ah oo ay ku jiraan erayo buuxin ah iyo laxan yar oo micne yar leh: bala-bala, socod-hami, hadh-hadh, guux-fudud, iyo weedho dheer oo ah laga-yaabee-laga-yaabee.

Qoraalku mar kasta wuxuu ku soo laabanayaa jirka, biyo-qaadka, safka, cimilada, iyo geesaha yar ee kala beddela maalmaha. Dabadeed si ula kac ah ayuu u geliyaa gibberish waxtar leh: luli-luli, marooq-marooq, hadal-dabayl, socod-dhac, biyo-birlab, ciid-hadal, iyo guux-madhan. Nacasnimadan yar ayaa halkan loogu daray si boggu u qaado qoraal dheer, loo tijaabiyo rogista, loona arko sida faruhu u dhaqmaan marka sheekadu ka weynaato soo koobista ka muuqata kaarka gallery-ga.

Xataa noocan la buunbuuniyey, tiirarka ugu waaweyn way muuqdaan. Fatahaad ayaa safka hore joogta, halka Barakac, Soo kabasho ay u socdaan sida mawduucyo raaca. Calaamadaha dadka wali way shaqaynayaan, balse tuducyadu ma noqonayaan kuwo farsamo kaliya ah. Halkii, waxay ku qulqulayaan hadal qaybo-qaybo ah, wareegyo daawasho leh, iyo codad la sameeyey oo sida nala-nala, hummaag-jid, qorrax-qabow, iyo hadh-socod u shaqeeya, si dhererku u gaadho qiyaastii laba boqol iyo konton eray oo ku habboon tijaabada qaabeynta.

reflection.en:
This reflection reads the story first through flooding, because that is the clearest thread holding the scene together in Baidoa. The account remains grounded in ordinary actions rather than large declarations, and that helps the issue stay close to the reader. Hodan keeps returning to paths, pauses, repeated tasks, and tiny shifts in pace, which makes the setting feel lived rather than summarised. For layout testing, the paragraph also carries a little useful nonsense: tiri-tiri, hushline, side-glow, market-drift, and coast-thread, all inserted simply to give the text more weight on the page.

The secondary themes, especially Displacement and Recovery, widen the frame without taking over from the main one. They sit beside the primary theme like quieter signals, helping the story feel layered rather than boxed into one label. This is also where the prototype benefits from extra copy. A longer paragraph reveals whether spacing, margins, and line length still feel calm when the reading block grows. So the text wanders deliberately through soft filler and half-words: mira-mira, bendi-bendi, dust-echo, river-note, para-step, and lantern-noise, all there to make the section breathe more densely.

The people layer matters as well. Children, Women/Girls, Men/Boys appear as a human guide to who is visible in the account, but not as the only way of understanding it. That balance is important for browsing. The story should still feel local, textured, and particular, while the interface quietly supports comparison across places and themes. Here the reflection keeps that balance by staying plain, steady, and editorial. Then, for testing, it adds a few drifting sounds of language again: moro-moro, light-silt, market-flare, small-turn, road-whisper, and rain-edge.

As a whole, this section works like a soft bridge between the longer story above and the filtered gallery below. It tells the reader why the story connects to others without becoming overly academic or technical. It also gives the layout a heavier reading state so typography, hierarchy, and rhythm can be judged properly in both dark and light themes. Nothing in the added gibberish changes meaning, but it does help the design prove itself under longer editorial copy, longer scrolls, and denser visual pacing.
reflection.so:
Milicsigan waxa uu sheekada marka hore ka akhriyaa fatahaad, sababtoo ah taas ayaa ah xadhigga ugu muuqda ee isku haya goobta ka muuqata Baydhabo. Qoraalku waxa uu ku dheggan yahay falal maalinle ah halkii uu ka noqon lahaa hadal culus, taasina waxa ay akhriska ka dhigaysaa mid dhow. Hodan marar badan ayuu ku noqdaa waddooyinka, sugitaanka, hawlaha soo noqnoqda, iyo isbeddellada yar yar ee xawaaraha, si goobtu u ekaato mid la nool yahay. Tijaabadan awgeed waxa ku jira erayo aan macne lahayn sida tiri-tiri, hushline, side-glow, iyo coast-thread.

Mawduucyada kale, gaar ahaan Barakac iyo Soo kabasho, waxa ay ballaariyaan fahamka iyaga oo aan meesha ka saarayn mawduuca koowaad. Waxay ag joogsadaan sida calaamado deggan oo sheekada ka dhigaya mid lakabyo leh. Halkaas ayaana qoraalka dheer faa’iido leeyahay, sababtoo ah waxa uu muujinayaa in kala fogaanshaha, margin-ka, iyo dhererka sadaradu weli deggan yihiin marka qoraalku bato. Sidaas darteed waxa si ula kac ah u dhex socda ereyo tijaabo ah sida mira-mira, bendi-bendi, dust-echo, river-note, para-step, iyo lantern-noise.

Lakabka dadka isaguna waa muhiim. Carruur, Haween/Gabdho, Rag/Wiilal waxay muuqdaan sida tilmaam bani’aadamnimo oo tusaya cidda ugu badan ee sheekada ku jirta, balse ma noqdaan qaabka keliya ee lagu fahmo sheekada. Tani waxay muhiim u tahay marka la daalacanayo sheekooyin kala duwan. Sheekadu waa inay ahaataa mid deegaan leh, qoto dheer, oo gaar ah, halka is-dhexgalkuna si aamusnaan ah u taageerayo isbarbardhigga. Halkan qoraalku waxa uu ku sii daraa erayo sabbaynaya sida moro-moro, light-silt, market-flare, small-turn, road-whisper, iyo rain-edge.

Guud ahaan, qaybta milicsigu waxay u shaqaysaa sidii buundo jilicsan oo u dhexaysa sheekada sare iyo gallery-ga la shaandheeyo ee hoose. Waxay u sheegaysaa akhristaha sababta sheekadani ugu xidhan tahay kuwo kale iyada oo aan aad u noqon mid culus ama farsamo badan. Waxa kale oo ay siisaa naqshadda xaalad akhris oo ka culus si xarfaha, kala sarreynta, iyo garaaca guud loo eego si fiican, labadaba muuqaalka madow iyo kan iftiinka. Gibberish-ka lagu daray ma beddelayo macnaha, balse waxa uu ka caawiyaa naqshadda inay u adkaysato qoraal dheer iyo socod dheer oo tijaabo ah.

Jidadka yaryar iyo meelaha la wadaago ayaa noqda halka laga arko sida nolosha maalinlaha ahi u isku xirto dadka. Qoraalku wuxuu ku bilaabmaa cod deggan oo sharaxaya muuqaalka, dabadeedna si ula kac ah ayuu ugu leexdaa hadal tijaabo ah oo ay ku jiraan erayo buuxin ah iyo laxan yar oo micne yar leh: bala-bala, socod-hami, hadh-hadh, guux-fudud, iyo weedho dheer oo ah laga-yaabee-laga-yaabee.

Qoraalku mar kasta wuxuu ku soo laabanayaa jirka, biyo-qaadka, safka, cimilada, iyo geesaha yar ee kala beddela maalmaha. Dabadeed si ula kac ah ayuu u geliyaa gibberish waxtar leh: luli-luli, marooq-marooq, hadal-dabayl, socod-dhac, biyo-birlab, ciid-hadal, iyo guux-madhan. Nacasnimadan yar ayaa halkan loogu daray si boggu u qaado qoraal dheer, loo tijaabiyo rogista, loona arko sida faruhu u dhaqmaan marka sheekadu ka weynaato soo koobista ka muuqata kaarka gallery-ga.

Xataa noocan la buunbuuniyey, tiirarka ugu waaweyn way muuqdaan. Meel wadaag ayaa safka hore joogta, halka Jadwal maalinle ay u socdaan sida mawduucyo raaca. Calaamadaha dadka wali way shaqaynayaan, balse tuducyadu ma noqonayaan kuwo farsamo kaliya ah. Halkii, waxay ku qulqulayaan hadal qaybo-qaybo ah, wareegyo daawasho leh, iyo codad la sameeyey oo sida nala-nala, hummaag-jid, qorrax-qabow, iyo hadh-socod u shaqeeya, si dhererku u gaadho qiyaastii laba boqol iyo konton eray oo ku habboon tijaabada qaabeynta.

reflection.en:
This reflection reads the story first through shared space, because that is the clearest thread holding the scene together in Baidoa. The account remains grounded in ordinary actions rather than large declarations, and that helps the issue stay close to the reader. Luul keeps returning to paths, pauses, repeated tasks, and tiny shifts in pace, which makes the setting feel lived rather than summarised. For layout testing, the paragraph also carries a little useful nonsense: tiri-tiri, hushline, side-glow, market-drift, and coast-thread, all inserted simply to give the text more weight on the page.

The secondary themes, especially Routine, widen the frame without taking over from the main one. They sit beside the primary theme like quieter signals, helping the story feel layered rather than boxed into one label. This is also where the prototype benefits from extra copy. A longer paragraph reveals whether spacing, margins, and line length still feel calm when the reading block grows. So the text wanders deliberately through soft filler and half-words: mira-mira, bendi-bendi, dust-echo, river-note, para-step, and lantern-noise, all there to make the section breathe more densely.

The people layer matters as well. Children, Women/Girls, Men/Boys appear as a human guide to who is visible in the account, but not as the only way of understanding it. That balance is important for browsing. The story should still feel local, textured, and particular, while the interface quietly supports comparison across places and themes. Here the reflection keeps that balance by staying plain, steady, and editorial. Then, for testing, it adds a few drifting sounds of language again: moro-moro, light-silt, market-flare, small-turn, road-whisper, and rain-edge.

As a whole, this section works like a soft bridge between the longer story above and the filtered gallery below. It tells the reader why the story connects to others without becoming overly academic or technical. It also gives the layout a heavier reading state so typography, hierarchy, and rhythm can be judged properly in both dark and light themes. Nothing in the added gibberish changes meaning, but it does help the design prove itself under longer editorial copy, longer scrolls, and denser visual pacing.
reflection.so:
Milicsigan waxa uu sheekada marka hore ka akhriyaa meel wadaag, sababtoo ah taas ayaa ah xadhigga ugu muuqda ee isku haya goobta ka muuqata Baydhabo. Qoraalku waxa uu ku dheggan yahay falal maalinle ah halkii uu ka noqon lahaa hadal culus, taasina waxa ay akhriska ka dhigaysaa mid dhow. Luul marar badan ayuu ku noqdaa waddooyinka, sugitaanka, hawlaha soo noqnoqda, iyo isbeddellada yar yar ee xawaaraha, si goobtu u ekaato mid la nool yahay. Tijaabadan awgeed waxa ku jira erayo aan macne lahayn sida tiri-tiri, hushline, side-glow, iyo coast-thread.

Mawduucyada kale, gaar ahaan Jadwal maalinle, waxa ay ballaariyaan fahamka iyaga oo aan meesha ka saarayn mawduuca koowaad. Waxay ag joogsadaan sida calaamado deggan oo sheekada ka dhigaya mid lakabyo leh. Halkaas ayaana qoraalka dheer faa’iido leeyahay, sababtoo ah waxa uu muujinayaa in kala fogaanshaha, margin-ka, iyo dhererka sadaradu weli deggan yihiin marka qoraalku bato. Sidaas darteed waxa si ula kac ah u dhex socda ereyo tijaabo ah sida mira-mira, bendi-bendi, dust-echo, river-note, para-step, iyo lantern-noise.

Lakabka dadka isaguna waa muhiim. Carruur, Haween/Gabdho, Rag/Wiilal waxay muuqdaan sida tilmaam bani’aadamnimo oo tusaya cidda ugu badan ee sheekada ku jirta, balse ma noqdaan qaabka keliya ee lagu fahmo sheekada. Tani waxay muhiim u tahay marka la daalacanayo sheekooyin kala duwan. Sheekadu waa inay ahaataa mid deegaan leh, qoto dheer, oo gaar ah, halka is-dhexgalkuna si aamusnaan ah u taageerayo isbarbardhigga. Halkan qoraalku waxa uu ku sii daraa erayo sabbaynaya sida moro-moro, light-silt, market-flare, small-turn, road-whisper, iyo rain-edge.

Guud ahaan, qaybta milicsigu waxay u shaqaysaa sidii buundo jilicsan oo u dhexaysa sheekada sare iyo gallery-ga la shaandheeyo ee hoose. Waxay u sheegaysaa akhristaha sababta sheekadani ugu xidhan tahay kuwo kale iyada oo aan aad u noqon mid culus ama farsamo badan. Waxa kale oo ay siisaa naqshadda xaalad akhris oo ka culus si xarfaha, kala sarreynta, iyo garaaca guud loo eego si fiican, labadaba muuqaalka madow iyo kan iftiinka. Gibberish-ka lagu daray ma beddelayo macnaha, balse waxa uu ka caawiyaa naqshadda inay u adkaysato qoraal dheer iyo socod dheer oo tijaabo ah.

Then it deliberately wanders into useful nonsense: lora lora, bendi-bendi, hushline, salt-noise, para-step, water-glint, coast-thread, dust-murmur, and field-echo. That gibberish is here on purpose so the page can hold longer reading blocks, test scrolling behaviour, and show how the typography behaves when the story becomes denser than the summary card below.

Even in this inflated version, the main cues remain readable. Agriculture sits in front, while Harvest stay nearby as secondary currents. The people tags still matter, yet the prose avoids becoming technical. Instead it drifts through spoken fragments, observational loops, and little clusters of invented sound: nala-nala, brimstep, open hush, weather-click, shade-signal, road-gloss, and a few extra lines of pleasant nonsense to stretch the layout, settle the spacing, and keep the story field hovering at roughly two hundred and fifty words overall.

Dabadeed si ula kac ah ayuu u geliyaa gibberish waxtar leh: luli-luli, marooq-marooq, hadal-dabayl, socod-dhac, biyo-birlab, ciid-hadal, iyo guux-madhan. Nacasnimadan yar ayaa halkan loogu daray si boggu u qaado qoraal dheer, loo tijaabiyo rogista, loona arko sida faruhu u dhaqmaan marka sheekadu ka weynaato soo koobista ka muuqata kaarka gallery-ga.

Xataa noocan la buunbuuniyey, tiirarka ugu waaweyn way muuqdaan. Meel wadaag ayaa safka hore joogta, halka Daryeel ay u socdaan sida mawduucyo raaca. Calaamadaha dadka wali way shaqaynayaan, balse tuducyadu ma noqonayaan kuwo farsamo kaliya ah. Halkii, waxay ku qulqulayaan hadal qaybo-qaybo ah, wareegyo daawasho leh, iyo codad la sameeyey oo sida nala-nala, hummaag-jid, qorrax-qabow, iyo hadh-socod u shaqeeya, si dhererku u gaadho qiyaastii laba boqol iyo konton eray oo ku habboon tijaabada qaabeynta.

reflection.en:
This reflection reads the story first through shared space, because that is the clearest thread holding the scene together in Baidoa. The account remains grounded in ordinary actions rather than large declarations, and that helps the issue stay close to the reader. Deqa keeps returning to paths, pauses, repeated tasks, and tiny shifts in pace, which makes the setting feel lived rather than summarised. For layout testing, the paragraph also carries a little useful nonsense: tiri-tiri, hushline, side-glow, market-drift, and coast-thread, all inserted simply to give the text more weight on the page.

The secondary themes, especially Care work, widen the frame without taking over from the main one. They sit beside the primary theme like quieter signals, helping the story feel layered rather than boxed into one label. This is also where the prototype benefits from extra copy. A longer paragraph reveals whether spacing, margins, and line length still feel calm when the reading block grows. So the text wanders deliberately through soft filler and half-words: mira-mira, bendi-bendi, dust-echo, river-note, para-step, and lantern-noise, all there to make the section breathe more densely.

The people layer matters as well. Women/Girls, Elders appear as a human guide to who is visible in the account, but not as the only way of understanding it. That balance is important for browsing. The story should still feel local, textured, and particular, while the interface quietly supports comparison across places and themes. Here the reflection keeps that balance by staying plain, steady, and editorial. Then, for testing, it adds a few drifting sounds of language again: moro-moro, light-silt, market-flare, small-turn, road-whisper, and rain-edge.

As a whole, this section works like a soft bridge between the longer story above and the filtered gallery below. It tells the reader why the story connects to others without becoming overly academic or technical. It also gives the layout a heavier reading state so typography, hierarchy, and rhythm can be judged properly in both dark and light themes. Nothing in the added gibberish changes meaning, but it does help the design prove itself under longer editorial copy, longer scrolls, and denser visual pacing.
reflection.so:
Milicsigan waxa uu sheekada marka hore ka akhriyaa meel wadaag, sababtoo ah taas ayaa ah xadhigga ugu muuqda ee isku haya goobta ka muuqata Baydhabo. Qoraalku waxa uu ku dheggan yahay falal maalinle ah halkii uu ka noqon lahaa hadal culus, taasina waxa ay akhriska ka dhigaysaa mid dhow. Deqa marar badan ayuu ku noqdaa waddooyinka, sugitaanka, hawlaha soo noqnoqda, iyo isbeddellada yar yar ee xawaaraha, si goobtu u ekaato mid la nool yahay. Tijaabadan awgeed waxa ku jira erayo aan macne lahayn sida tiri-tiri, hushline, side-glow, iyo coast-thread.

Mawduucyada kale, gaar ahaan Daryeel, waxa ay ballaariyaan fahamka iyaga oo aan meesha ka saarayn mawduuca koowaad. Waxay ag joogsadaan sida calaamado deggan oo sheekada ka dhigaya mid lakabyo leh. Halkaas ayaana qoraalka dheer faa’iido leeyahay, sababtoo ah waxa uu muujinayaa in kala fogaanshaha, margin-ka, iyo dhererka sadaradu weli deggan yihiin marka qoraalku bato. Sidaas darteed waxa si ula kac ah u dhex socda ereyo tijaabo ah sida mira-mira, bendi-bendi, dust-echo, river-note, para-step, iyo lantern-noise.

Lakabka dadka isaguna waa muhiim. Haween/Gabdho, Waayeel waxay muuqdaan sida tilmaam bani’aadamnimo oo tusaya cidda ugu badan ee sheekada ku jirta, balse ma noqdaan qaabka keliya ee lagu fahmo sheekada. Tani waxay muhiim u tahay marka la daalacanayo sheekooyin kala duwan. Sheekadu waa inay ahaataa mid deegaan leh, qoto dheer, oo gaar ah, halka is-dhexgalkuna si aamusnaan ah u taageerayo isbarbardhigga. Halkan qoraalku waxa uu ku sii daraa erayo sabbaynaya sida moro-moro, light-silt, market-flare, small-turn, road-whisper, iyo rain-edge.

Guud ahaan, qaybta milicsigu waxay u shaqaysaa sidii buundo jilicsan oo u dhexaysa sheekada sare iyo gallery-ga la shaandheeyo ee hoose. Waxay u sheegaysaa akhristaha sababta sheekadani ugu xidhan tahay kuwo kale iyada oo aan aad u noqon mid culus ama farsamo badan. Waxa kale oo ay siisaa naqshadda xaalad akhris oo ka culus si xarfaha, kala sarreynta, iyo garaaca guud loo eego si fiican, labadaba muuqaalka madow iyo kan iftiinka. Gibberish-ka lagu daray ma beddelayo macnaha, balse waxa uu ka caawiyaa naqshadda inay u adkaysato qoraal dheer iyo socod dheer oo tijaabo ah.
